name: Moonlight Citrine Tree
description: A tree often seen around Hiisi Island in Nod-Krai. It is characterized by its slender curved trunk and golden crown.\nIt is said that the Frostmoon Scions are especially fond of this tree as the hue of its leaves resemble the golden glow of moonlight. Thus, as an expression of their devotion to the divine, they have planted these trees along both sides of the path leading to the Light-Bathed Platform.
